Elyon Schools

Excellence in Education

HomeAboutAdmissionsGalleryNews & EventsContact
Primary 1 - Primary 6

Primary School

Building strong foundations for lifelong learning. Our primary program develops well-rounded students prepared for secondary education and beyond.

Class Levels

Six years of progressive learning building towards academic excellence

Primary 1
5-6 years

Foundation literacy and numeracy

Primary 2
6-7 years

Reading fluency and basic operations

Primary 3
7-8 years

Independent learning skills

Primary 4
8-9 years

Critical thinking development

Primary 5
9-10 years

Advanced concepts preparation

Primary 6
10-11 years

Common Entrance preparation

Our Curriculum

A comprehensive curriculum aligned with national standards

English Language

Reading, writing, grammar, and comprehension

Mathematics

Arithmetic, geometry, and problem-solving

Basic Science

Introduction to scientific concepts and methods

Social Studies

Nigerian history, geography, and civic education

Nigerian Languages

Yoruba, Igbo, or Hausa language studies

Creative Arts

Visual arts, crafts, and creative expression

Music

Singing, instruments, and music appreciation

Physical Education

Sports, fitness, and healthy living

Academic Excellence

Our students consistently perform well in Common Entrance examinations

Qualified Teachers

Experienced educators passionate about child development

Modern Curriculum

Following Nigerian Educational Research and Development Council guidelines

Holistic Development

Focus on academics, character, and extracurricular activities

School Facilities

Our primary school is equipped with modern facilities to support effective teaching and learning. We create an environment where children can explore, discover, and excel.

Well-equipped classrooms
Computer laboratory
Science corner
Library with diverse books
Sports facilities
Regular assessments
Parent-teacher meetings
After-school programs

School Hours

Monday - Friday
7:30 AM - 2:30 PM

Class Size

Maximum 25 students
per class

Common Entrance Success

95% of our Primary 6 students pass Common Entrance exams

Enroll Your Child Today

Give your child the strong academic foundation they need to succeed. Admissions are open for all primary levels.

Footer

Elyon Schools

Est. 1994

Nurturing young minds from Nursery through Secondary education. Building tomorrow's leaders with excellence in academics, character, and values.

123 Education Avenue, Lagos, Nigeria
+234 803 123 4567
info@elyonschools.edu.ng
Mon - Fri: 7:30 AM - 4:00 PM
